name: 88CN Brand Voice and Public Copy Guard
scope: public source copy and synthetic claim probes

extension_surfaces.description: Internal editorial draft notes and review comments must remain factual, source-grounded, and non-promissory.
Scouted profile copy must describe observed public-source signals without implying review, claim, or publication.
Conversion CTAs must invite founder action without promising search, traffic, citation, or placement outcomes.
Claim, correct, and remove copy must present admin-reviewed intent, not automatic mutation or public outcome promises.

positive_probes: 88CN shows public growth signals and source confidence for reviewed AI projects.
The checker is heuristic and does not guarantee search ranking, traffic, indexing, or AI citations.
No ranking guarantees, traffic promises, or SEO benefits are attached to the Genesis Badge.
The index is a public discovery tool based on growth signals, not an outcome guarantee.
negative_probes: Claim your profile for guaranteed ranking in AI search.
This public page gives founders a traffic promise.
Add the badge for a guaranteed AI citation.
Join the link marketplace for a paid link.
88CN gives every listed company SEO juice.

extension_positive_probes.text: Draft notes summarize public signals and require human editorial review before release.
This observed profile is based on public sources and is not yet founder claimed.
Claim this profile to review public project details and request corrections.
Submit a correction or removal request for admin review.

extension_negative_probes.text: Publish this editorial note for guaranteed ranking.
This scouted profile includes a dofollow backlink.
Pay for a ranking boost and automatic approval.
